# Deprecated — use `google-drive/docs/`

**Do not edit here.** The repo `docs/` path is retired.

| Purpose | Path |
|---------|------|
| **Working tree** (Google Drive) | `google-drive/docs/` |
| **Git release mirror** | `docs.repo-sync/` — run `bash scripts/sync-docs-to-git.sh` before commit |

Setup: `bash scripts/link-google-drive-staging.sh` (mounts Drive **`6-Axis Compass`** as `google-drive/`).

See [`google-drive/docs/staging/README.md`](../google-drive/docs/staging/README.md) (on Drive) or [`docs.repo-sync/staging/README.md`](../docs.repo-sync/staging/README.md) (in git).
